key_metrics: Diluted EPS of $0.32, down from $0.33 YoY
Income from operations of $559.1 million, down 4.6% YoY
Delivery service revenue of $15.6 million, down 14.1% YoY
qoq_changes: Net income increased 12.8% QoQ from $386.6 million in Q1 2025 to $436.1 million in Q2 2025
Share repurchases decreased QoQ to $440.6 million from $591.5 million in Q1 2025
new_risks: Margin compression driven by rising labor costs ($756.3M vs $716.6M YoY) and other operating costs ($428.7M vs $384.8M YoY)
Continued deterioration in delivery service revenue, indicating potential weakness or consumer shift away from the delivery channel
management_tone: Cautious, as modest top-line revenue growth was overshadowed by rising labor and operating costs that compressed margins and drove a YoY decline in net income.
analyst_note: Chipotle posted a mixed quarter with 3% revenue growth offset by a 4.3% drop in net income due to persistent cost pressures. Investors should monitor the rising labor expenses and the double-digit decline in delivery revenue, which are currently weighing on operating margins despite aggressive share repurchases.
